scripts.build: npm run build:ts && browserify index.source.js --standalone OmegaTarget --exclude bluebird --exclude jsondiffpatch --exclude omega-pac -o index.js && browserify index.source.js --standalone OmegaTarget | esbuild --loader=js --minify > omega_target.min.js
scripts.test: npm run build:ts && NODE_PATH=.. TZ=Europe/London _mocha --reporter spec test/*.js
